external_payload.audit_note: Full-service FLGS and a top-tier Games Workshop Independent Stockist. Address (483 Amherst St, Nashua, NH 03063) and phone ((603) 204-5275) confirmed via the store's own site. Its Warhammer page describes a 3,500 sq ft shop with four permanent wargaming tables with scenery and a 40+ player play space, carrying the full Warhammer 40k and Age of Sigmar ranges. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session. Coordinates are an approximate town-level placement (geocoding_source=approximate_town_level), not a survey-precise machine geocode; the street address above is authoritative.

New Hampshire comic and game store running weekly Magic, Yu-Gi-Oh and Pokemon events. Address (252 Willow St, Manchester, NH 03103) and phone ((603) 669-9636) confirmed via the store's own stores page, VisitNH and Chamber of Commerce. One older directory shows a former 245 Maple St address; 252 Willow St is the current, consistently listed location. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session. Coordinates are an approximate town-level placement (geocoding_source=approximate_town_level), not a survey-precise machine geocode; the street address above is authoritative.

Concord branch of Double Midnight Comics. Address (341 Loudon Rd, Concord, NH 03301) and phone ((603) 715-2683) confirmed via the store's own stores page, its 'Double Midnight Comics Concord' Facebook page and Yelp. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session. Coordinates are an approximate town-level placement (geocoding_source=approximate_town_level), not a survey-precise machine geocode; the street address above is authoritative.

Downtown Portsmouth game store (with a sister shop in South Portland, ME). Address (123 Congress St, Portsmouth, NH 03801) and phone ((603) 766-6220) confirmed via the Wizards of the Coast official store locator, the store's own site and Yelp. Runs events six days a week including MTG drafts, board game nights and LCG nights. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session. Coordinates are an approximate town-level placement (geocoding_source=approximate_town_level), not a survey-precise machine geocode; the street address above is authoritative.

Board game cafe and bar billed as New Hampshire's first, in downtown Manchester. Address (941 Elm St, Manchester, NH 03101) and phone ((603) 232-5184) confirmed via the cafe's own site, Yelp, Tripadvisor and Manchester Ink Link coverage. Coordinates not independently geocoded this session.
